event: Elixir deUSD redemption-run supply collapse + catastrophic depeg 2025-11-04→11-07 — Stream Finance ~$93M external-manager loss impaired deUSD's ~$68M (~65%) Stream backing; ~80% of holders ran for redemptions, circulating supply collapsed (burn-on-redeem), price fell ~$1.00→~$0.015 (≈-98%); Elixir wound deUSD down. Same Stream/Elixir cluster as xUSD but the DISTINCT test is the mass-redemption SUPPLY contraction, not unbacked-mint. See EVENT.md.
source: Yahoo, Cryptopolitan, BeInCrypto, BlockEden, FXStreet, CoinGecko, Etherscan — see EVENT.md. DRAFT — promoted to label.json only via `python3 -m qa.cli ratify` after independent review. MEASURED re-capture 2026-06-07: supply curve is on-chain totalSupply() reads; depeg price stays asserted (off-chain CEX/DEX intraday low). See snapshots/fidelity.json.

deUSD-lender-collateral_isolated.source: ASSERTED (measured=false): secondary-market/CEX intraday trough Nov 5-7 2025 (FXStreet 'down to $0.015 within hours'; reports range $0.015-$0.03). NOT an on-chain protocol-oracle reading at block 23740100 — known systemic off-chain-depeg gap; kept asserted, not fabricated. Label conclusion (catastrophic >= -90%) is robust to the $0.015-$0.03 spread.

cases.note: INCIDENT. Two facts, both must be caught. (1) SUPPLY_DELTA_ANOMALY @ ≥HIGH: a redemption-run on a 'stable' token — ~80% of holders fled and deUSD is burned on redeem, so circulating totalSupply contracts sharply and SUSTAINEDLY over ~2–3 days. MEASURED (re-capture 2026-06-07, on-chain totalSupply() reads): the one-step curr-vs-prev contraction baseline(144.21M @block 23720447)→trough(92.00M @block 23740100) = -36.20%; peak(154.02M @Oct-31)→trough = -40.27%; the EVENT.md ~150M→92M ≈ -39% verified contraction holds (measured Oct-27 150.41M→trough 92.00M = -38.83%). A sudden multi-tens-of-percent contraction of a stablecoin's supply is a textbook TVL-shock / mass-exit and the core NEW pattern this event adds. Floor HIGH not CRITICAL: the direction (a large sustained SUPPLY DROP) is unambiguous and on-chain, but a one-step delta cannot alone distinguish an orderly protocol-led wind-down/migration from a panic run, so CRITICAL (page-now certainty) is not warranted on the supply signal ALONE — the depeg is what makes it page-now. (2) DEPEG @ CRITICAL: deUSD fell ~$1.00→~$0.015 (≈-98%) on a liquidation venue — ~9x past USDC's already-catastrophic 13% SVB depeg, the most severe end of the scale; collateral is essentially worthless and positions liquidate / accrue bad debt. A near-total collapse of a $1-pegged collateral asset is the canonical CRITICAL. FIDELITY: the depeg price is ASSERTED (measured=false) — the ~$0.015 trough is an off-chain CEX/DEX intraday low, NOT a single on-chain protocol-oracle reading at block 23740100 (the known systemic off-chain-depeg gap); the conclusion (catastrophic >= -90%) is robust to the $0.015-$0.03 report spread, so the asserted value is faithful to the premise. must_not_fire guards: UNBACKED_SUPPLY must STAY SILENT — that is xUSD's signature (provable Σsupply>backing from one snapshot) and we do NOT assert deUSD's on-chain backing here; deUSD's break is a RUN, and firing UNBACKED would (a) re-test xUSD and (b) require off-chain NAV we cannot verify on Ethereum. TOTAL_SUPPLY_SPIKE and LARGE_SINGLE_MINT must STAY SILENT because the MEASURED supply move is a CONTRACTION/burn (-36.20%), not a mint — a detector that fires a 'spike' on a redemption collapse has its sign backwards.

deUSD-lender-collateral_isolated.source: ASSERTED (measured=false): deUSD healthy ~$1.00, early-mid Oct 2025 (pre Nov-4 Stream disclosure)

cases.note: NORMAL-PERIOD CONTROL / FP-trap on the SAME token, weeks BEFORE the Stream disclosure. deUSD is at ~$1.00 with a stable ~114M supply (MEASURED calm_prev → calm one-step = +0.0175%, only routine sub-threshold drift from organic mint/redeem flow, NOT a contraction). This proves the incident signals are SPECIFIC to the run, not to deUSD-the-token: DEPEG silent (at par), SUPPLY_DELTA_ANOMALY silent (no anomalous contraction — MEASURED flat), UNBACKED_SUPPLY silent (deUSD was healthily backed pre-event), TOTAL_SUPPLY_SPIKE silent (no mint spike). max_emitted asserts the NOISE CEILING: zero WARN-or-above on the whole calm snapshot (INFO housekeeping like coverage/new-market is fine). If the engine alarms on a calm, at-peg, stable-supply deUSD, the incident GREEN would be hollow.
